data.content:
[implementation-review] Approved.

Diff: 4 modified + 1 new test file. ~290 LOC added.

Code review:
- New LeaseDeadDispatchFailure type cleanly extends the existing
  DispatchFailureInfo discriminated union; bannerBodyFor() router
  is exhaustive across the 3 kinds.
- evaluateLeaseHealth is pure (takes leaseId, repoPath, checker);
  10 hermetic tests cover all reason branches + the
  unrecognized-state defensive case.
- sendFollowUpPrompt's signature change (now async, takes optional
  leaseChecker) is non-breaking: the default checker is the real
  listLeases. Callers get the new behavior automatically.
- Old foolery-6881 tests adapted with a 2-line vi.mock + a
  knotsLeaseId/knotsLeaseStep on the entry stub. The mock returns
  a single lease in lease_active, which the existing tests'
  dispatched agent context expects.
- New lifecycle event take_loop_follow_up_skipped_dead_lease
  follows the existing naming convention.
- Banner reuse: emitDispatchFailureBanner from dispatch-pool-resolver
  is used unchanged; no duplicate ANSI logic.
- Audit event lease_dead_on_followup follows the existing
  lease_* naming convention.

Acceptance match (per knot description):
- ✅ sendFollowUpPrompt acquires lease state immediately before send.
- ✅ Refuses to send if not in {lease_ready, lease_active}.
- ✅ Banner uses FOOLERY DISPATCH FAILURE marker.
- ✅ Banner body includes sessionId, beatId, currentBeatState (as
  beatState), iteration, leaseId, leaseState, expectedStep,
  agentName, agentProvider, agentModel, agentVersion, followUpCount,
  promptSource, plus reason and per-reason remediation hint.
- ⚠️ leaseTerminatedAt is not in the banner — kno's listLeases JSON
  doesn't surface that timestamp on the lease record. Could be
  added by reading from the beat's step_history but adds complexity
  for marginal value (the snapshot files written by foolery-dd9c
  already carry this).
- ✅ Hermetic unit test in src/lib/__tests__/.
- ✅ lease_dead_on_followup audit event.

Out of scope (per plan, not regressions): no maestro-ca91 manual
repro test (would require knots-stub that simulates rollback);
hermetic tests cover the same code path.

Quality gates: lint, tsc, test (3066 passed), build all green.

Approve and ship.
